final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single-panel knowledge card illustration for children explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms period, in a cartoon storybook style.

Style/medium: single large knowledge card, children's cartoon illustration, storybook infographic aesthetic
Composition: full-card layout — large central cartoon scene occupying the majority of the card, title banner at the top, bullet-point key facts panel arranged neatly along the side margin with numbered or dotted markers
Subject: Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) — cartoon depiction of the key story moments: Cao Cao's massive fleet on the Yangtze River, Zhou Yu and Zhuge Liang's alliance, the fire attack strategy (火攻), burning ships, and the dramatic defeat of Cao Cao's navy
Scene/backdrop: Yangtze River at night or dusk, large fleet of warships, dramatic flames spreading across the water
Lighting/mood: warm dramatic glow from the fire attack, exciting and adventurous tone appropriate for children
Color palette: bright, saturated, child-friendly colors — deep river blue, warm orange-red flames, vivid greens and golds for the characters
Materials/textures: flat cartoon illustration with clean outlines, soft cel-shading, storybook texture
Text (verbatim): 标题：「赤壁之战」; 要点列表（旁边标点）：① 时间：公元208年 ② 交战双方：曹操 vs 孙刘联军 ③ 关键人物：曹操、周瑜、诸葛亮 ④ 策略：火烧赤壁 ⑤ 结果：曹操大败，三国鼎立格局形成
Constraints: title must be prominent at the top; key-points bullet list must be clearly readable along the side; central cartoon scene must be the dominant visual; all text in Chinese; child-friendly, non-violent depiction of the battle (flames and ships, no gore)
Avoid: adult-oriented war imagery, realistic gore or violence, cluttered layout, overly small text, Western comic style
